---
title: "9. MT_GP"
author: "sss322"
date: "2025-07-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
```

## **0. Importing the dependencies**

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(asreml)
library(ggplot2)
library(ASRgenomics)
library(readxl)
library(MASS)
library(tidyr)
library(caret)
```




## **1. Importing the phenotypic data**

```{r}
base_path <- if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  "C:/Users/Siim Sepp/Predicting_WMB_for_NY"
} else {
  "~/Documents/GitHub/Predicting_WMB_for_NY"
}

load(file.path(base_path, "data/data_mq.Rdata"))
load(file.path(base_path, "data/MT_raw_wide.Rdata"))
data_mq <- data_mq %>% na.omit()
```


## **2. Assembling the phenotype data**

```{r}
# raw VI join for MQ MT GP
corVI_raw <- data.frame(
  plot_id = c(
    rownames(MT_raw_w$KET21_4),
    rownames(MT_raw_w$SNY22_6),
    rownames(MT_raw_w$MCG23_5),
    rownames(MT_raw_w$HELF24_7),
    rownames(MT_raw_w$MCG25_12)
  ),
  NDVI = c(
    MT_raw_w$KET21_4[, 1],
    MT_raw_w$SNY22_6[, 1],
    MT_raw_w$MCG23_5[, 1],
    MT_raw_w$HELF24_7[, 1],
    MT_raw_w$MCG25_12[, 1]
  ),
  PSRI = c(
    MT_raw_w$KET21_4[, 9],
    MT_raw_w$SNY22_6[, 9],
    MT_raw_w$MCG23_5[, 9],
    MT_raw_w$HELF24_7[, 9],
    MT_raw_w$MCG25_12[, 9]
  )
)

MT_mq_raw_df <- left_join(data_mq, corVI_raw, by = "plot_id")


# pred VI join for agronomic MT GP
load(file.path(base_path, "data/MT_pred_wide.Rdata"))
corVI_pr <- data.frame(
  GID = c(
    rownames(MT_pr_w$KET21_4),
    rownames(MT_pr_w$SNY22_6),
    rownames(MT_pr_w$MCG23_5),
    rownames(MT_pr_w$HELF24_7),
    rownames(MT_pr_w$MCG25_12)
  ),
  NDVI = c(
    MT_pr_w$KET21_4[, 1],
    MT_pr_w$SNY22_6[, 1],
    MT_pr_w$MCG23_5[, 1],
    MT_pr_w$HELF24_7[, 1],
    MT_pr_w$MCG25_12[, 1]
  ),
  PSRI = c(
    MT_pr_w$KET21_4[, 9],
    MT_pr_w$SNY22_6[, 9],
    MT_pr_w$MCG23_5[, 9],
    MT_pr_w$HELF24_7[, 9],
    MT_pr_w$MCG25_12[, 9]
  ),
  Env = c(
    rep("KET21",  nrow(MT_pr_w$KET21_4)),
    rep("SNY22",  nrow(MT_pr_w$SNY22_6)),
    rep("MCG23",  nrow(MT_pr_w$MCG23_5)),
    rep("HELF24", nrow(MT_pr_w$HELF24_7)),
    rep("MCG25",  nrow(MT_pr_w$MCG25_12))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# merge agronomic BLUEs
load(file.path(base_path, "data/ag_BLUE_spatial.RData"))
preds <- preds[, -5] %>% pivot_wider(values_from = "Predicted", names_from = "VI")
preds <- preds %>% na.omit()
MT_ag_pr_df <- left_join(preds, corVI_pr, by = c("GID", "Env"))
```




Adding the FPC and PCA data
```{r}
load(file.path(base_path, "data/F_PCA_scoresG.Rdata"))
FPC_scores <- FPCA_scores_df %>%
  filter(VI %in% c("NDVI", "PSRI")) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = VI, values_from = colnames(FPCA_scores_df[1:3]))

MT_raw_MQ <- left_join(MT_mq_raw_df, FPC_scores[, -2], by = c("plot_id"))
```




## **3. MT_GBLUP function and env loop function**


```{r}

safe_cor <- function(x, y) {
  ok <- stats::complete.cases(x, y)
  if (sum(ok) < 2L) return(NA_real_)
  x <- x[ok]; y <- y[ok]
  if (stats::sd(x) == 0 || stats::sd(y) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  suppressWarnings(stats::cor(x, y))
}



run_bivariate_gblup_cv <- function(data, A1, traits, cor_traits,
                                   reps = 5, folds = 5, spatial = FALSE,
                                   mask = c("j_only", "both", "i_only"),
                                   env_label = NA_character_) {
  mask <- match.arg(mask)
  res_all  <- data.frame()
  fail_log <- list()

  GIDs_global <- intersect(unique(as.character(data$GID)), rownames(A1))
  if (length(GIDs_global) == 0L) {
    warning("[", env_label, "] No common GIDs between data and A1.")
    return(list(results = data.frame(), failures = data.frame()))
  }
  A1_sub    <- A1[GIDs_global, GIDs_global]
  Ghat.bend <- G.tuneup(G = A1_sub, bend = TRUE, eig.tol = 1e-03)$Gb
  Ginv      <- G.inverse(Ghat.bend)$Ginv

  for (i in cor_traits) {
    for (j in traits) {
      if (i == j) next

      message("\n[", env_label, "] Fitting model: ", paste0("cbind(", i, ", ", j, ") ~ trait"))

      all_traits <- c(i, j)
      df_sub <- data[, c("GID", "Row", "Column", all_traits), drop = FALSE]
      df_sub <- df_sub[df_sub$GID %in% GIDs_global, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(df_sub) == 0L) next

      df_sub$GID <- factor(as.character(df_sub$GID), levels = GIDs_global)

      for (rep_run in seq_len(reps)) {
        gids_present <- unique(as.character(df_sub$GID))
        fold_gid     <- sample(rep(seq_len(folds), length.out = length(gids_present)))
        names(fold_gid) <- gids_present
        fold_ids <- fold_gid[as.character(df_sub$GID)]

        for (f in seq_len(folds)) {
          df_cv       <- df_sub
          df_cv$units <- seq_len(nrow(df_cv))

          df_long <- rbind(
            data.frame(GID = df_cv$GID, Row = df_cv$Row, Column = df_cv$Column,
                       trait = i, value = df_cv[[i]], units = df_cv$units),
            data.frame(GID = df_cv$GID, Row = df_cv$Row, Column = df_cv$Column,
                       trait = j, value = df_cv[[j]], units = df_cv$units)
          )
          df_long$GID <- factor(as.character(df_long$GID), levels = rownames(Ginv))
          df_long$trait <- factor(df_long$trait, levels = c(i, j))
          df_long$fold  <- rep(fold_ids, times = 2)

          if (mask == "j_only") {
            df_long$value[df_long$trait == j & df_long$fold == f] <- NA
          } else if (mask == "i_only") {
            df_long$value[df_long$trait == i & df_long$fold == f] <- NA
          } else if (mask == "both") {
            df_long$value[df_long$fold == f] <- NA
          }

          if (spatial) {
            rand_formula <- ~ vm(GID, Ginv):corgh(trait) + ar1(Row):ar1(Column)
            res_formula  <- ~ idv(units)
            df_long$Row    <- as.factor(df_long$Row)
            df_long$Column <- as.factor(df_long$Column)
          } else {
            rand_formula <- ~ vm(GID, Ginv):corgh(trait)
            res_formula  <- ~ idv(units)
          }

          mod_cv <- tryCatch({
            asreml(
              fixed     = value ~ trait,
              random    = rand_formula,
              residual  = res_formula,
              data      = df_long,
              na.action = list(x = "include", y = "include"),
              workspace = 7e8,
              maxit     = 100,
              ai.sing   = TRUE,
              trace     = FALSE
            )
          }, error = function(e) {
            fail_log[[length(fail_log) + 1L]] <<- data.frame(
              Env = env_label, Trait = j, Cor_Trait = i, Rep = rep_run, Fold = f,
              Stage = "model", Error = e$message, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
            return(NULL)
          })
          if (is.null(mod_cv)) next

          if (!mod_cv$converge) {
            mod_cv <- tryCatch(update(mod_cv), error = function(e) mod_cv)
          }

          pred_cv <- tryCatch({
            p <- predict(mod_cv, classify = "GID:trait")$pvals
            p <- p[p$trait == j, , drop = FALSE]
            colnames(p)[colnames(p) == "predicted.value"] <- "BV_cv"
            p
          }, error = function(e) {
            fail_log[[length(fail_log) + 1L]] <<- data.frame(
              Env = env_label, Trait = j, Cor_Trait = i, Rep = rep_run, Fold = f,
              Stage = "predict", Error = e$message, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
            return(NULL)
          })
          if (is.null(pred_cv)) next

          test_gids <- names(fold_gid)[fold_gid == f]
          truth <- df_sub[as.character(df_sub$GID) %in% test_gids, c("GID", j), drop = FALSE]
          colnames(truth)[2] <- "true"
          truth <- truth[!is.na(truth$true), , drop = FALSE]
          if (nrow(truth) < 2L) next
          truth <- aggregate(true ~ GID, data = truth, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)

          merged  <- merge(truth, pred_cv[, c("GID", "BV_cv")], by = "GID", all = FALSE)
          cor_val <- if (nrow(merged) >= 2L) safe_cor(merged$BV_cv, merged$true) else NA_real_

          res_all <- rbind(res_all, data.frame(
            Env = env_label, Trait = j, Cor_Trait = i, Rep = rep_run, Fold = f, Cor = cor_val,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
        }
      }
    }
  }

  list(results = res_all,
       failures = if (length(fail_log)) do.call(rbind, fail_log) else NULL)
}

```




```{r}
run_bivariate_gblup_cv_over_envs <- function(MT_raw_ag, A1,
                                             envs,
                                             traits,
                                             cor_traits,
                                             reps = 5, folds = 5,
                                             spatial = FALSE,
                                             mask = c("j_only", "both", "i_only")) {
  mask <- match.arg(mask)
  all_res  <- list()
  all_fail <- list()

  for (e in envs) {
    message("\n================ ENV: ", e, " ================")
    dat_e <- MT_raw_ag[MT_raw_ag$Env == e, , drop = FALSE]

    if (nrow(dat_e) == 0L) {
      warning("No rows for Env = ", e)
      next
    }

    present_traits <- intersect(traits, names(dat_e))
    present_cor    <- intersect(cor_traits, names(dat_e))
    if (length(present_traits) == 0L || length(present_cor) == 0L) {
      warning("No overlapping traits/cor_traits in Env = ", e)
      next
    }

    dat_e$GID <- as.factor(dat_e$GID)
    dat_e$Row    <- factor(dat_e$Row,
                           levels = sort(unique(as.integer(as.character(dat_e$Row)))))
    dat_e$Column <- factor(dat_e$Column,
                           levels = sort(unique(as.integer(as.character(dat_e$Column)))))

    out <- run_bivariate_gblup_cv(
      data       = dat_e,
      A1         = A1,
      traits     = present_traits,
      cor_traits = present_cor,
      reps       = reps,
      folds      = folds,
      spatial    = spatial,
      mask       = mask,
      env_label  = e
    )

    if (!is.null(out$results) && nrow(out$results) > 0L)
      all_res[[length(all_res) + 1L]] <- out$results

    if (!is.null(out$failures) && nrow(out$failures) > 0L)
      all_fail[[length(all_fail) + 1L]] <- out$failures
  }

  list(
    results  = if (length(all_res)) dplyr::bind_rows(all_res) else NULL,
    failures = if (length(all_fail)) dplyr::bind_rows(all_fail) else NULL
  )
}

```



## **4. Setup**

```{r}
envs    <- c("KET21", "SNY22", "MCG23", "HELF24", "MCG25")
mqtrait <- c("KernelWeight.mg.", "on6.64....", "MaltExtract...", "BarleyProtein..",
             "WortProtein...", "S.T", "DP..ASBC.", "Alpha.amylase.20.DU.",
             "Beta.glucan.ppm.", "FAN.ppm.", "AdjunctQualityScore", "All_MaltQualityScore")
agtraits   <- c("yield_kgha", "HD_JD")
cor_traits <- c("NDVI", "PSRI", "FPC1_NDVI", "FPC1_PSRI", "FPC2_NDVI", "FPC2_PSRI",
                "FPC3_NDVI", "FPC3_PSRI")
load(file.path(base_path, "data/geno/WMB_master_geno.RData"))
```



## **5. MT_GBLUP MQ raw**

```{r}
MT_raw_MQ$GID    <- as.character(MT_raw_MQ$GID)
MT_raw_MQ$Column <- as.character(MT_raw_MQ$Column)
MT_raw_MQ$Row    <- as.character(MT_raw_MQ$Row)

envs <- unique(MT_raw_MQ$Env)
MT_mq_res_raw_sp <- run_bivariate_gblup_cv_over_envs(
  MT_raw_MQ, A1,
  envs       = envs,
  traits     = mqtrait,
  cor_traits = cor_traits,
  reps = 50, folds = 5,
  spatial = TRUE,
  mask = "j_only"
)

save(MT_mq_res_raw_sp, file = file.path(base_path, "output/MT_mq_res_raw_sp.Rdata"))

table(MT_mq_res_raw_sp$results$Cor_Trait)
boxplot(MT_mq_res_raw_sp$results$Cor ~ MT_mq_res_raw_sp$results$Trait)
```




## **6. MT_GBLUP agronomic pred**

```{r}
MT_ag_pr_df$Row    <- NA
MT_ag_pr_df$Column <- NA
envs <- unique(MT_ag_pr_df$Env)

MT_ag_res_pr <- run_bivariate_gblup_cv_over_envs(
  MT_ag_pr_df, A1,
  envs       = envs,
  traits     = agtraits,
  cor_traits = cor_traits,
  reps = 50, folds = 5,
  spatial = FALSE,
  mask = "j_only"
)

save(MT_ag_res_pr, file = file.path(base_path, "output/MT_ag_res_pr.Rdata"))
```



## **Results: Multi-trait GBLUP accuracy**

```{r, eval=TRUE}
base_path <- if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  "C:/Users/Siim Sepp/Predicting_WMB_for_NY"
} else {
  "~/Documents/GitHub/Predicting_WMB_for_NY"
}
library(dplyr)
load(file.path(base_path, "output/MT_ag_res_pr.Rdata"))
load(file.path(base_path, "output/MT_mq_res_raw_sp.Rdata"))

ag_sum <- MT_ag_res_pr$results %>%
  group_by(Trait, Cor_Trait) %>%
  summarise(mean_r = round(mean(Cor, na.rm=TRUE), 3), .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(Trait, desc(mean_r))

mq_sum <- MT_mq_res_raw_sp$results %>%
  group_by(Trait, Cor_Trait) %>%
  summarise(mean_r = round(mean(Cor, na.rm=TRUE), 3), .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(Trait, desc(mean_r))

cat("Agronomic (BLUE) — mean MT-GBLUP accuracy by trait × correlated trait:\n"); print(ag_sum)
cat("\nMalt quality (raw) — mean MT-GBLUP accuracy by trait × correlated trait:\n"); print(mq_sum)
```
